recipes.name: Elixir of Type Safety
recipes.description: Grants the drinker the ability to see type errors before they happen. Side effects may include an irresistible urge to add type annotations everywhere.

effects.name: Type Safety Vision
effects.description: See type mismatches highlighted in red before compilation

effects.name: Exhaustive Intuition
effects.description: Instinctively know when a pattern match is incomplete

recipes.brewing_time: 2 hours at 350°F (the temperature of a warm build)

recipes.name: Fearless Refactoring Draught
recipes.description: Emboldens the drinker to restructure code without fear. Warning: may cause spontaneous renaming of variables to more descriptive names.

effects.name: Fearless Refactoring
effects.description: Restructure code with complete confidence that nothing will break

effects.name: Dependency Clarity
effects.description: See the full dependency graph of any function at a glance

recipes.brewing_time: 3 hours (stir every time a test passes)

recipes.name: Documentation Dew
recipes.description: Ensures that documentation never drifts from reality. Brewed exclusively from mdexp-powered sources.

effects.name: Living Documentation
effects.description: All documentation you write automatically stays in sync with the code

effects.name: Snapshot Sight
effects.description: Instantly see when expected output has drifted from actual output

recipes.brewing_time: 1 hour (must be brewed during a successful build)

recipes.name: Homebrew Tonic
recipes.description: Lets you install anything with a single tap. Not to be confused with actual homebrew, though the formula is similar.

effects.name: One-Tap Install
effects.description: Install any tool with a single command — no dependency hell

effects.name: Formula Intuition
effects.description: Instinctively know the right flags for any CLI tool
